name_cn:
Top-tier replica, changed code chip
M12362 authentic development, steel lock hardware
LV Vibe family launches new Camera Box bag. Glossy calfskin cut into a unique shape, Monogram details elevate the classic style, S-lock clasp and metal corners subtly reveal the brand identity.

Handle: Single handle
